title: [colorbox]
text: [colorbox] The [colorbox] section of the assignment file defines the Custom Colors palette of the Windows Color dialog box. Description This section is added to the user's .ini file the first time the colorbox ProcScript statement is executed. It contains the CustomColors setting, storing the colors defined in the Custom Colors palette of the Microsoft Color dialog box. The custom colors are loaded at startup and saved on exit when changes have been made. Related Links usys.ini The usys.ini file is the default initialization file for Uniface applications.
